name: EEC_REWARDS_VL
query: SELECT B.ROWID ROW_ID, B.REWARD_ID, B.POSITION, B.REWARD_CRITERIA, B.THRESHOLD, B.ACTIVE_FLAG, T.NAME, T.REWARD_PRIZE, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.CREATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER FROM EEC_REWARDS_TL T, EEC_REWARDS_B B WHERE B.REWARD_ID = T.REWARD_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = userenv('LANG')
